description_long: This bungalow features a light blue gabled roof with visible shingles and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal beige siding, and the front facade includes a wooden double garage door and a main entrance with steps leading up to the porch. Multiple windows are present, including a set of two on the side and a larger window on the porch side, all with white frames. The roof includes a dormer window above the garage, adding architectural interest and natural light to the upper space. The porch is bordered by a white railing and wooden floorboards, providing a welcoming entryway. The overall design is compact and symmetrical, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A compact bungalow with a light blue gabled roof, beige siding, a front porch, and multiple white-framed windows. The facade features a wooden garage door and a welcoming porch with white columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with white columns, wooden steps, and a double garage door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof, the side wall with horizontal siding, and partial view of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two symmetrically placed windows and the full expanse of the gabled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large window, the porch from the side, and the intersection of the roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and a dormer window above the garage
